name: i18n-swarm
description: Deterministic code-side i18n agent for English-only web apps: extracts UI strings, scaffolds next-intl / vue-i18n / react-i18next, rewires components, and self-verifies that the app still builds and tests stay green.
author: greymoth

scripts.selfcheck: node test/selfcheck.ts && node test/selfcheck-jsx.ts && node test/selfcheck-report.ts && node test/selfcheck-audit.ts && node test/selfcheck-check.ts && node test/selfcheck-suppress.ts
scripts.prepublishOnly: tsc --noEmit && node test/selfcheck.ts && node test/selfcheck-jsx.ts && node test/selfcheck-report.ts && node test/selfcheck-audit.ts && node test/selfcheck-check.ts && node test/selfcheck-suppress.ts && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
